name: Fell from ladder at work but symptoms started late, can I still claim?

mainEntity.name: Fell from ladder at work but symptoms started late, can I still claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, with medical proof linking to fall; update claim.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description:
Yes, delayed symptoms from ladder falls like back pain qualify if linked to the incident by medical evidence.[3]

Report promptly and update your claim with new doctor findings.[1] Insurers challenge causation.

- See specialist for causation letter.
- Keep dated symptom journal.
- File amendments.

Lawyer connects dots for approval; don't delay reporting.[2]

description: Yes, with medical proof linking to fall; update claim.[3]
